entry.title: 你好 review: 12.9” iPad Pro (2018)
entry.summary: I bought the 12.9” iPad Pro with the Apple Pencil back in 2018 and spoiler alert: I still use the iPad almost every day.

entry.title: 2023 in review
entry.summary: Another year in review - even though it feels like I wrote the previous one not so long ago. Time flies and it’s flying faster and faster each and every year.

entry.title: 2021 in review
entry.summary: Welcome to the end of 2021, a.k.a. the second year of the pandemic. Another year of not going abroad, barely seeing friends, playing Dungeons & Dragons via Zoom instead of at the table. A year of mild depression and feelings of loneliness. But also a year of hope when we all got access to the vaccines and when we didn't hear about Trump every day in the news. And last but not least: it was also a very productive year!

entry.title: Vapor 4 vs. Django REST Framework
entry.summary: Over two years ago I wrote an article where I compared Vapor 3 to Django REST Framework. It's time for a rematch with Vapor 4.

entry.title: WWDC20 wishlist
entry.summary: WWDC is just around the corner, and we're all waiting like little kids at Christmas to see what Apple is going to announce. Most of us also are hoping for specific changes, here are my top wishes.

entry.title: 简单的逻辑学笔记
entry.summary: 本文记录了《简单的逻辑学》基本概念
